content.title: Muslims Day Ansar Update!
content.subtitle: 517 Ansar have already joined us!
content.body:
Alhamdulillah! Muslims Day Ansar has now grown to 517 members.

Today is Jumu’ah, a blessed day of du’a and a beautiful opportunity to invest in our Akhirah.

Just two months ago, we launched the Muslims Day Ansar (Supporter) Program. Alhamdulillah, 517 brothers and sisters have already joined this da’wah mission.

May Allah reward every one of them abundantly in this life and the Hereafter. Ameen.

🎯 What is the mission of Muslims Day?

Our goal is not simply to run an app.

Our dream is to build a platform that helps millions of Muslims grow closer to Allah every single day by reading the Qur’an, becoming more mindful of their Salah, learning du’as, and guiding their families toward Islam.

In the next six months, our goal is to reach 10 million Muslims Day app installations, InshaAllah, so that more people can benefit from authentic Islamic knowledge, meaningful acts of worship, and opportunities for spiritual growth.

🤝 Who are Muslims Day Ansar?

Running and expanding this mission requires consistent financial support.

From among our millions of users, we are looking for just 2,000 Ansar who will contribute BDT 500 per month and become part of this ongoing Sadaqah Jariyah.

They are not merely premium subscribers. They are companions and supporters of this da’wah mission.

📊 Our next milestone

To complete our community of 2,000 Ansar, we need just 1,483 more supporters.

Your contribution can become part of our journey to bring beneficial Islamic knowledge to 10 million Muslims.

Perhaps through your support, Allah will enable the light of Deen to reach countless more people.

💎 What do you receive as an Ansar?

✅ The opportunity to share in the reward of the good deeds of millions of Muslims

✅ Premium subscriptions to 7 Muslims Day services

✅ FREE access to special online halaqahs, seminars, and exclusive events

A special webinar for Ansar members will be held on July 31 2026.
Topic: Productive Muslim: What, Why, and How?

But the greatest reward is the opportunity to become part of an ongoing effort to serve the Deen.

🌙 Make a decision this Jumu’ah

For you, BDT 500 per month may not be a large amount. It might be close to what you spend on a single meal or snack at a restaurant.

But this small contribution could become a Sadaqah Jariyah whose rewards continue even after you leave this world, InshaAllah.

On this blessed day of Jumu’ah, become a Muslims Day Ansar and join this mission.

InshaAllah, it could become one of the most meaningful investments you make for your Akhirah.

I want to become a Muslims Day Ansar! 👉 Click 👉 https://id.kahf.co/ansar/muslimsday

footer_button.hint: In a short time, we've been blessed with a growing community of Muslims Day Ansars. Join this blessed journey and become one of them!
